what_was_done: Removed the boot code indexer — the last remaining piece of the code indexing system. Deleted ~700 lines across 7 files: _run_code_indexer(), _search_code_internal(), CODE_INDEX_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS, chunking functions, reindex_code UDS handler/socket wrapper, boot trigger, statusline display, and all indexer tests. search_knowledge(mode='code') now gracefully falls back to auto-detect. Tests: 1422 pass, 2 fail (pre-existing UDS issues).
